plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to zero.
Exit SMH due to poor performance and downtrend.
Trim QQQ and CRWD to reduce concentration and tech risk.
Increase allocation to QQQI for income generation.
Initiate a position in XOM for stability.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with reduced leverage and sector concentration.
conservative.read: This plan aims for capital preservation with a target of around 1.5% per month. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration risk, holding a larger cash buffer. Expect lower volatility but also lower growth potential.

plan: Trim leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to minimal levels.
Exit SMH due to its poor performance and downtrend.
Reduce QQQ exposure to lower broad index concentration.
Increase CRWD allocation and add CRM for quality tech exposure.
Add QQQI to boost income generation.
This plan balances risk reduction with growth by trimming concentration and adding quality names.
balanced.read: This plan targets around 2.5% per month with a risk-first approach to growth. It reduces concentration and leverage while adding quality names and income. Expect moderate volatility and growth.

plan: Increase SOXL allocation to leverage semiconductor upside.
Exit SMH due to its poor performance and downtrend.
Reduce QQQ exposure to free up capital for stronger names.
Increase CRWD, add CRM, and AAPL for concentrated tech growth.
Initiate a position in SOXS to hedge semiconductor exposure or profit from declines.
This plan aggressively pursues growth by increasing leverage and concentrating in high-scoring tech names.
aggressive.read: This plan targets around 4% per month, accepting higher risk for aggressive growth. It increases leverage and concentrates in top-rated tech and semiconductor names, including inverse ETFs. Expect significantly higher volatility and potential for large drawdowns.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) and high-beta tech (CRWD).
Exit SMH due to poor performance and downtrend.
Sell QQQ to eliminate broad index exposure.
Maximize allocation to QQQI for steady monthly income.
Add XOM for stable income and diversification.
This plan prioritizes generating reliable monthly income with minimal volatility.
income.read: This plan focuses on generating steady monthly income, targeting around 1% per month. It cuts all speculative and leveraged positions, heavily favoring income-generating ETFs like QQQI and stable assets like XOM. Expect very low volatility but limited capital appreciation.
